programs.title: Tribunal Justice
programs.desc: A blind man sues his former caretaker, claiming breach of agreement for living rent-free in exchange for services.

programs.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programs.desc: Bobby says Victoria cheated around the time she got pregnant, has been having sex for money and has created fake social media accounts to make him look like an overzealous boyfriend; Quan wants to know for sure if Imani's daughter is really his.

programs.title: Karamo
programs.sub_title: Unlock: Blocked From Grandma's Funeral; Unlock: You Broke My Heart ... Should I Break Our Lease?
programs.desc: Shannon and her cousin Sarah were inseparable until their grandmother passed away; then, Shannon says, Sarah turned the entire family against her -- but Sarah tells a different story, insisting that the family has gone above and beyond to support Shannon; Jada and Michael are struggling to move on while still living under the same roof -- Jada isn't ready to let go, and she wants Michael's phone unlocked to get the truth.

programs.title: Judy Justice
programs.desc: An American bully breeder sues a man for the remaining balance on a puppy purchased for his seven-year-old daughter.

programs.title: Judy Justice
programs.desc: A fundraising effort via t-shirt sales goes awry when a woman is dissatisfied with sample shirts and asks for a refund from a small business owner; a heated incident and a defamation countersuit follow soon after.
